hook: Over-giving early often looks generous but can function like a bid for control or reassurance.
body: When you front-load effort beyond the stage of the connection, you may be trying to secure certainty faster than reality allows.

hook: Some men confuse intensity of effort with maturity while quietly ignoring whether the effort is proportionate.
body: Healthy investment grows with the relationship instead of trying to drag the relationship forward by itself.

hook: Healthy investment grows with the relationship instead of trying to drag the relationship forward by itself.
body: Huge emotional labor after one date usually says more about your anxiety than your character.

hook: Huge emotional labor after one date usually says more about your anxiety than your character.
body: Match your level of giving to the amount of trust and mutuality that actually exists.
